meaning: adj.易于...的,有...倾向的,灵敏的,灵巧的,适当的,切题的,敏捷,倾向是
examples: The words of this report are as apt today as in 1929.
Babies are apt to put objects into their mouths.
She was apt to raise her voice and wave her hands about.
The regular Sunday concerts start at 4 pm at 555 Edgecombe Avenue, apt 3F.
The metaphor is strangely apt, but the story that's got AMs hot under the collar is quite different.
